summary: Fixed 'Unable to load news' bug on home screen. Root cause: Invalid hook call inside FlatList render callback and metro cache issue. The API works correctly.

issues: User reported white rectangle issue on selected items - NOT REPRODUCIBLE in web version. May be mobile-specific rendering issue on native APK build.

action_items: VERIFY the white rectangle issue on actual mobile APK - not reproducible on web
Consider testing native iOS/Android builds for category selection UI
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Invalid hook call - React.useState was called inside renderInshortsCard which is a FlatList render callback. Created separate ArticleCard component.
The metro cache was stale causing old code to run. Cleared cache to apply fix.
The API is working correctly - /api/news endpoint returns articles with proper pagination
seed_data_creation: None needed - RSS feeds provide real-time news data
context_for_next_testing_agent: The main bug (Unable to load news) was caused by React hooks being used inside a FlatList render callback. Created a separate ArticleCard component to properly use useState for image error handling. Metro cache needed to be cleared for changes to take effect. Backend API is fully functional. The white rectangle issue on category selection reported by user is NOT reproducible in web version - may be mobile APK specific.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Invalid React hook call - useState was being called inside renderInshortsCard function which is a render callback for FlatList, not a proper React component
reproduction_steps: 1. Navigate to home screen after selecting categories
2. API returns 200 OK but React throws 'Invalid hook call' error
3. Error prevents rendering of articles, shows loading screen indefinitely
mitigation: 1. Created separate ArticleCard component with proper React component structure
2. Moved useState hook for imageError into ArticleCard component
3. Cleared metro cache to apply changes
4. Updated renderInshortsCard to simply render ArticleCard with props
